data.text: Committed. Added `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/drain.e2e.ts` — two Playwright tests covering the drain-queue golden flow with the real-config endpoint shape (lmstudio + omlx + lmstudio + lmstudio), click-Drain → worker-row-within-5s, harness-bound-to-live-endpoint assertion, gemini cross-pollination guard, no-19-failure guard, and success-or-typed-error completion with reason and attempts-match-work assertions. Playwright `--list` discovers both tests under `bun run test:e2e`.
